fields.purpose: Organize public work after the first stable release.
current: Protocol, parser, CLI, and examples form the initial foundation.
Viewer and editor integrations expand adoption.
fields.ai_task: Turn roadmap nodes into scoped issues.
fields.ai_boundary: Do not promise dates without maintainer approval.
risk: A broad roadmap may hide the most important compatibility work.
verify: Each roadmap item links to a release gate or user workflow.
Completed work has tests or documentation.

acceptance: CLI supports validation, formatting, export, import, and packs.
Packages pass install and publish dry run checks.

fields.purpose: Add editor and knowledge-tool integrations after core stability.
verify: Integration proposals reference stable protocol behavior.
